_comment: A plan-CFI allow-list: the LEGAL plan shapes for an airline-booking agent. plancfi keys a Plan to a TraceID via internal/plancfi.Ledger.Declare; this JSON is the human-readable rendering of those Go Plan{Tools, Mode} values (see README — the kernel reads the Go Plan, not this file). Each entry is one approved call graph.

plans.name: airline-booking
plans._mode_note: AllowedSet: every call's tool must be in this set, order-free (robust to the retries/re-reads a real agent loop makes).

plans.name: ordered-checkout
plans._mode_note: Sequence: calls must follow this order; a repeat of the current or any prior step is fine, a jump AHEAD or an unlisted tool deviates.
